# Example Profile: Next.js Weekly

- profile_name: nextjs-weekly
- repository: https://github.com/vercel/next.js.git
- branch: canary
- period_days: 7
- output_path: nextjs-weekly-newsletter.md
- title_style: Next.js Product and Platform Weekly

Editorial focus:
- Prioritize app router behavior, server components, caching, build tooling, deployment ergonomics, and changes that affect large production apps.
- De-emphasize refactors that do not change user-facing behavior or developer workflows.
- Deep-dive candidates: caching semantics, rendering model changes, migration guidance, or edge-runtime implications.

Section preferences:
- Keep sections in this order: Product Surface, Rendering and Data Flow, Tooling and DX, Performance, Migration Notes.
- Include one short "What teams should verify this week" checklist when rollout risk exists.

Tone and format:
- Audience: frontend platform teams, staff engineers, and framework-heavy product groups.
- Keep the writing warm and practical, but clear about rollout risk and expected follow-up work.
